description: Mid-career median salary stored as US currency strings (e.g., '$83,900.00'). All 269 records are non-null, with 168 distinct values. Observed amounts span from '$76,600.00' to '$126,000.00'. The string data type enforces lexicographic ordering, producing an inverted reported minimum ('$101,000.00') and maximum ('$99,600.00') that prevents numeric aggregation and accurate range queries.
recommended_actions: [STANDARDIZE] Convert currency-formatted strings to numeric values by removing the '$' prefix and ',' thousands separators: '$83,900.00' → 83900.00. | [VALIDATE] Ensure all values follow the observed currency format: a leading dollar sign, digits with a thousands separator comma, and exactly two decimal places of '.00' — e.g., '$123,000.00'.
